subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God and daughter of His maidservant! In this Dispensation, when the Sun of Truth from the sign of Leo hath shed its radiance upon the horizons of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله و بنت امته در این کور که شمس حقیقت از برج اسد بر آفاق عالم اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @call to action
